title: Futuristic Alps in 2150
prompt: Create a cinematic wide shot of the Alps in the year 2150. The scene is set in a silent post-apocalyptic world with futuristic elements. Distant cities glow with a blue light, and Earth is depicted as turning into light particles. The atmosphere is vast and empty, with a cold color palette and soft fog. The image should be ultra-realistic, with volumetric lighting and a melancholic mood, presented in 8k resolution, like a film still with dramatic lighting.
